description: Standardized schema for evolutionary frameworks that track agent behavior patterns through their lifecycle

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this framework

trigger.description: The condition or context that activates this framework
trigger.example: when modifying state in TypeScript or Python

action.example: use spread operator or copy constructors, never mutate in place

confidence.description: 0.0 to 1.0 confidence score based on observation success rate

enforcement_level.description: 1=CLAUDE.md advice, 2=Memory injection, 3=Skill guidance, 4=Rule file, 5=Hook warning, 6=Hook block, 7=Session abort

observations.description: Total number of times this pattern has been observed

successes.description: Number of times the pattern led to a successful outcome

failures.description: Number of times the pattern failed to produce the desired outcome

domains.description: Tags for categorization (e.g., code-style, security, workflow)

evolved_from.description: IDs of instincts or frameworks this evolved from

amendments.description: IDs of amendments that modified this framework
